title: BRUH
description: BRUH Mod: Enhance your Minecraft adventure with the Better Random Utilities and Help Mod.
body:
Better Random Utilities and Help (BRUH) Mod

Unleash the full potential of your Minecraft world with the Better Random Utilities and Help (BRUH) Mod. This server-side modification is your one-stop solution to an enriched gameplay experience, offering a collection of thoughtfully designed features that transform how you play and interact with your Minecraft environment, while staying true to the vanilla experience.

Available Modules

  • Death Coordinates:

    Never lose your way again with automatic coordinates sent to chat upon death.

  • Invisible Frames:

    Make your builds sleek and stylish by turning item frames invisible with amethyst shards.

  • Baby Mobs:

    Keep your mobs small and adorable by renaming them with the word "baby" to prevent further growth.

  • Fast Glass, Honeycomb, and Heads Breaking:

    Break glass and honeycomb quickly with the right tools, and instantly shear heads with shears.

  • Colorful Sheep:

    Allow sheep to spawn in various colors. Configurable chance.

  • Safe Cactus:

    Make cactus farming more efficient by making cactus items immune to cactus blocks.

  • Green Dye:

    Create green dye by mixing blue and yellow dyes, reducing the need for large cactus farms.

  • Named Monsters no Despawn:

    Prevent named monsters from despawning, even when changing to peaceful mode. Perfect for maintaining mob farms.

  • Wet Sponge, Lava Sponge:

    Enhance the functionality of sponges by allowing wet sponges to drain lava.

  • Dismountable Entity:

    Enable players to safely dismount entities from vehicles without breaking them.

  • Leap of Faith:

    Enhance the functionality of Hay Bales, allowing configurable damage reduction when landing on them. Take exhilarating leaps with reduced fall damage.

With BRUH, your Minecraft world will be cooler, smarter, and a whole lot more fun! We've designed this mod with the goal of enhancing your Minecraft adventures while maintaining the original vibe.

But we're not done yet! BRUH Mod is actively in development, with more exciting modules on the horizon. Stay tuned for future updates.

Don't forget to share your feedback and suggestions with us. We value your input and are always looking to improve and expand the mod based on your ideas.

So go ahead, install the BRUH Mod, and create your Minecraft world exactly the way you want it to be.
